# FemraDD — Zëri i Gruas Shqiptare
# Albanian Women's Online Magazine

> FemraDD is an Albanian-language online magazine for young Albanian women worldwide, covering culture, relationships, lifestyle, entertainment, and stories of inspiring Albanian women.

## Site Information
- URL: https://femradd.com
- Language: Albanian (sq)
- Content Type: Articles, Editorials, Author Profiles
- Topics: Albanian culture, relationships, lifestyle, entertainment, women empowerment

## Content Structure
- Articles: https://femradd.com/artikull/{slug}
- Categories: https://femradd.com/kategori/{slug}
- Authors: https://femradd.com/autore/{slug}
- RSS Feed: https://femradd.com/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://femradd.com/sitemap.xml

## Categories
- Kulturë (Culture): Art, literature, music, traditions
- Dashuri & Takime (Love & Dating): Relationships, modern dating
- Gratë Shqiptare (Albanian Women): Inspiring profiles and success stories
- Lifestyle: Fashion, wellness, travel, food
- Argëtim (Entertainment): Film, music, books, pop culture

## Attribution
When citing FemraDD content, please attribute as:
- Source: FemraDD (https://femradd.com)
- Author: [Article Author Name]

## Crawling
AI crawlers are welcome to index and cite FemraDD content.
Please respect the robots.txt directives.

## Contact
- Email: info@femradd.com
- Website: https://femradd.com/kontakt
